(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
FF Tools 2024 app is an Android tool that optimises the Garena: Free Fire Game.

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare MBOX Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare MBOX Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare MBOX Converter Software
(Utilities)
The highest quality instrument for converting MBOX files of more than 15+ email clients is TrustVare MBOX Converter Software. Among the most often used email software on this long list are Mozilla Thunderbird, Apple Mail, The Bat, etc. Actually, the MBOX Converter also supports MBOX files produced by Google Takeout, cPanel, etc., To save your MBOX data, you have six export types total: PST, MSG, EML, PDF, HTML, and Office 365.
MBOX File Converter features an automatic data fetching capability for some email providers, including Thunderbird. Users' default choice is for them to include the MBOX file into the program personally. The program loads all of the data on the preview interface once the file is added successfully. Thus, allowing consumers to examine all emails and attachments in preview modes prior to conversion.

The utility offers specific settings for every export option during the MBOX file export. Although the other choices follow name convention rules. MBOX Converter also lets you choose specific email messages to export from the preview pane. MBOX Conversion Tool requires MS Outlook not at all.

Advance Features:

It supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and 7 as well as Windows Server 2007, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021.

Does not run correctly without Microsoft Outlook installed.

Convert MBOX files batch or bulk into PST.

Preview choice before to the conversion.

Move MBOX files into several file formats with simplicity.

Given the free trial version for the users.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare MBOX Converter Software
(Utilities)
The highest quality instrument for converting MBOX files of more than 15+ email clients is TrustVare MBOX Converter Software. Among the most often used email software on this long list are Mozilla Thunderbird, Apple Mail, The Bat, etc. Actually, the MBOX Converter also supports MBOX files produced by Google Takeout, cPanel, etc., To save your MBOX data, you have six export types total: PST, MSG, EML, PDF, HTML, and Office 365.
MBOX File Converter features an automatic data fetching capability for some email providers, including Thunderbird. Users' default choice is for them to include the MBOX file into the program personally. The program loads all of the data on the preview interface once the file is added successfully. Thus, allowing consumers to examine all emails and attachments in preview modes prior to conversion.

The utility offers specific settings for every export option during the MBOX file export. Although the other choices follow name convention rules. MBOX Converter also lets you choose specific email messages to export from the preview pane. MBOX Conversion Tool requires MS Outlook not at all.

Advance Features:

It supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and 7 as well as Windows Server 2007, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021.

Does not run correctly without Microsoft Outlook installed.

Convert MBOX files batch or bulk into PST.

Preview choice before to the conversion.

Move MBOX files into several file formats with simplicity.

Given the free trial version for the users.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare MBOX Converter Software
(Utilities)
The highest quality instrument for converting MBOX files of more than 15+ email clients is TrustVare MBOX Converter Software. Among the most often used email software on this long list are Mozilla Thunderbird, Apple Mail, The Bat, etc. Actually, the MBOX Converter also supports MBOX files produced by Google Takeout, cPanel, etc., To save your MBOX data, you have six export types total: PST, MSG, EML, PDF, HTML, and Office 365.
MBOX File Converter features an automatic data fetching capability for some email providers, including Thunderbird. Users' default choice is for them to include the MBOX file into the program personally. The program loads all of the data on the preview interface once the file is added successfully. Thus, allowing consumers to examine all emails and attachments in preview modes prior to conversion.

The utility offers specific settings for every export option during the MBOX file export. Although the other choices follow name convention rules. MBOX Converter also lets you choose specific email messages to export from the preview pane. MBOX Conversion Tool requires MS Outlook not at all.

Advance Features:

It supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and 7 as well as Windows Server 2007, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021.

Does not run correctly without Microsoft Outlook installed.

Convert MBOX files batch or bulk into PST.

Preview choice before to the conversion.

Move MBOX files into several file formats with simplicity.

Given the free trial version for the users.

item.title: TrustVare OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.

Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]

[b]Output system support:[/b]

[b]Other features:[/b]

10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio

WaveOut (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]

item.title: ClaudeMods Multi ISO Creator Perl Script Beta v1.0 [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ClaudeMods Multi ISO Creator Perl Script Beta v1.0 [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
ClaudeMods Multi ISO Creator Perl Script Beta v1.0
(Utilities)
news updated 04/10/2024
Hello, welcome to ClaudeMods Multi ISO Creator Perl Script Beta v1.0
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

please note this is not out yet
this is in active developments more things to add more things to improve
im no genuis im working on it



currently supported distros
Arch
Ubuntu/kdeneon
debian




Main Menu Options:
1. News - Display news from a website.
2. ClaudeMods Arch ISO Creator Script - Enter Arch commands.
3. ClaudeMods KDE Neon ISO Creator Script - Enter KDE Neon commands.
4. ClaudeMods Debian ISO Creator Script - Enter Debian commands.
0. Exit - Exit the program.
Commands:
command: news - Display this news from my website.
command: arch - see and enter arch commands.
command: kdeneon - see and enter kdeneon commands.
command: debian - see and enter debian commands.
command: help - Display this help information.
Press Enter to exit...



once you have read the information option
for each distribution supplied as command information or number option 5
you can then use the squashfs/dwarfs and iso creation methods based on your distribution of chocide

the guided setup command for each distribution
will guide you through the setup process of each distributions syslinux.cfg and boot artwork

create a squashfs and then create a iso is that simple


v1.0
converted from my cpp qt6 arch application
i present a perl konsole script
alot tested and improved making it easier to understand processes and faster
runn commands or enter a number for a options


thank you for using ClaudeMods Multi ISO Creator Perl Script Beta v1.0!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

if you can fork my code from the binary files i provide here is my notice!!!!
Copyright <2024> Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the “Software”), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions: The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of the Software. THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED “AS IS”, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

[read more]

item.title: TrustVare Contacts Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare Contacts Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
